commands: Expand the Round Robin analysis to include the impact of the time quantum on response time and throughput, discussing how different quantum values might affect performance.
Clarify the description of Shortest Job First (SJF) by noting that it can be preemptive in certain implementations, and discuss the implications of this on response time and starvation.
Revise the assumption regarding context switching overhead, providing a more nuanced discussion on its potential impact on scheduling performance, especially in a multi-core environment.
Include an analysis of priority inversion in Priority Scheduling, discussing how this could affect fairness and response time in scenarios with varying process priorities.
